subcodes.first_line: O thou who art eager for the Luminary of the horizons! In the feast of the Covenant such a pledge was taken that no room remained for the people of discord to sow dissension [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق نیر آفاق در بزم میثاق چنان عهدی گرفت که ارباب شقاق را مجال نفاق نماند
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
